sentences.target: Unser Betrieb macht heute früher zu.

translations.de: Unser Betrieb macht heute früher zu.
translations.en: Our company is closing earlier today.
translations.es: Hoy nuestra empresa cierra más temprano.
translations.fr: Notre entreprise ferme plus tôt aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi la nostra azienda chiude prima.
translations.ko: 우리 회사는 오늘 일찍 문을 닫아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们公司今天提前下班。
translations.yue: 我哋公司今日會提早收工。
translations.pt: Hoje nossa empresa vai fechar mais cedo.
translations.he: החברה שלנו נסגרת היום מוקדם יותר.
translations.vi: Hôm nay công ty đóng cửa sớm hơn.
translations.hi: आज हमारी कंपनी जल्दी बंद हो रही है.
translations.pl: Nasza firma dzisiaj zamyka się wcześniej.
translations.el: Η εταιρεία μας σήμερα κλείνει νωρίτερα.
translations.nb: Bedriften vår stenger tidligere i dag.
translations.id: Perusahaan kami hari ini tutup lebih awal.
translations.ro: Compania noastră închide mai devreme astăzi.
translations.da: Vores virksomhed lukker tidligere i dag.
translations.ja: うちの会社は今日は早めに終わります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person plural) modifying 'Betrieb'; nominative singular masculine; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; nominative singular masculine; syntactic subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (Präsens, 3rd person singular) of the separable verb 'zumachen' (to close); verbal head of the clause; linked with the particle 'zu'.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate; indicates the day of the action.
Comparative adverb expressing a time earlier than usual.
Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'zumachen'; appears in clause-final position.

sentences.target: Ich fange morgen im Betrieb an.

translations.de: Ich fange morgen im Betrieb an.
translations.en: I start at the company tomorrow.
translations.zh-Hans: 我明天开始在公司上班。
translations.yue: 我聽日開始喺公司返工。
translations.ru: Завтра я начинаю работать в компании.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi bắt đầu làm việc ở công ty.
translations.nl: Morgen begin ik bij het bedrijf.
translations.uk: Завтра я починаю працювати в компанії.
translations.hi: मैं कल कंपनी में काम शुरू कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I morgen begynner jeg i selskapet.
translations.id: Besok saya mulai bekerja di perusahaan.
translations.da: I morgen starter jeg i virksomheden.
translations.ja: 明日から会社で働き始めます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb (Präsens, 1st person singular) of the separable verb 'anfangen' (to start); head of the predicate; its particle appears clause-final.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the action.
Contraction of 'in dem' (preposition + definite article, Dat.Sg.); introduces a dative prepositional phrase of location.
Common noun; dative singular masculine governed by 'im'; object of the preposition; denotes the workplace.
Separable verbal particle completing 'anfangen'; occurs at the end of the main clause.

translations.en: The company is on lunch break right now.
translations.es: Ahora la empresa está en la pausa del almuerzo.
translations.fr: L'entreprise est en pause déjeuner en ce moment.
translations.it: In questo momento l'azienda è in pausa pranzo.
translations.pt: Agora a empresa está no horário de almoço.
translations.tr: Şu anda şirkette öğle molası var.
translations.vi: Hiện công ty đang nghỉ trưa.
translations.nl: Het is nu lunchpauze bij het bedrijf.
translations.hi: अभी कंपनी में लंच ब्रेक है.
translations.pl: Teraz w firmie jest przerwa obiadowa.
translations.el: Τώρα στην εταιρεία είναι διάλειμμα για μεσημεριανό.
translations.nb: Nå er det lunsjpause i bedriften.
translations.id: Saat ini perusahaan sedang istirahat makan siang.
translations.sv: Just nu är det lunchrast på företaget.
translations.ro: Acum la companie este pauza de prânz.
translations.cs: Teď je ve firmě polední pauza.
translations.da: Lige nu er der frokostpause i virksomheden.

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine; determiner of 'Betrieb'.
Common noun; nominative singular masculine; syntactic subject.
Finite main verb (Präsens, 3rd person singular) meaning 'has'; predicates an idiomatic possession/state ('hat Mittagspause').
Temporal/adverbial marker indicating the action is occurring at the moment.
Common noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'hat' in the expression 'hat Mittagspause'.

sentences.target: Im Betrieb läuft alles wieder normal.

translations.de: Im Betrieb läuft alles wieder normal.
translations.en: At work, everything is back to normal.
translations.es: En la empresa todo volvió a la normalidad.
translations.fr: Dans l'entreprise, tout est redevenu normal.
translations.it: In azienda è tornato tutto alla normalità.
translations.ko: 회사에선 모든 게 다시 정상으로 돌아왔어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 公司里一切都恢复正常了。
translations.yue: 公司而家一切都恢復正常。
translations.ru: В компании всё снова как обычно.
translations.pt: Na empresa, tudo voltou ao normal.
translations.tr: İşyerinde her şey yine normale döndü.
translations.vi: Ở công ty, mọi thứ đã trở lại bình thường.
translations.ar: في الشركة عاد كل شيء إلى طبيعته.
translations.nl: Op het werk is alles weer normalt.
translations.hi: कंपनी में अब सब कुछ फिर से सामान्य है.
translations.pl: W firmie wszystko znów wróciło do normy.
translations.el: Στην εταιρεία όλα έχουν επιστρέψει στο φυσιολογικό.
translations.nb: På jobben er alt tilbake til normalen.
translations.id: Di kantor semuanya sudah kembali normal.
translations.sv: På jobbet är allt tillbaka till det normala.
translations.ro: La companie, totul a revenit la normal.
translations.cs: Ve firmě je zase všechno como obvykle.
translations.da: På jobbet er alt tilbage til normalen.
translations.ja: 会社ではすべてが元に戻りました。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem' (preposition + definite article, Dat.Sg.); introduces a dative prepositional phrase of location.
Common noun; dative singular masculine governed by 'im'; object of the preposition; denotes the location.
Finite main verb (Präsens, 3rd person singular) meaning 'runs/operates/goes'; predicates the state of affairs.
Indefinite pronoun; nominative singular neuter; subject of the clause.
Adverb indicating repetition/restoration ('again').
Adverb describing the manner/state ('normally/normal'); modifies the predicate.

jp: Unser Betrieb macht heute früher zu.
Ich fange morgen im Betrieb an.
Im Betrieb läuft alles wieder normal.
de: Unser Betrieb macht heute früher zu.
Ich fange morgen im Betrieb an.
Im Betrieb läuft alles wieder normal.
en: Our company is closing earlier today.
I start at the company tomorrow.
The company is on lunch break right now.
At work, everything is back to normal.

es: Hoy nuestra empresa cierra más temprano.
Ahora la empresa está en la pausa del almuerzo.
En la empresa todo volvió a la normalidad.
fr: Notre entreprise ferme plus tôt aujourd'hui.
L'entreprise est en pause déjeuner en ce moment.
Dans l'entreprise, tout est redevenu normal.
it: Oggi la nostra azienda chiude prima.
In questo momento l'azienda è in pausa pranzo.
In azienda è tornato tutto alla normalità.

회사에선 모든 게 다시 정상으로 돌아왔어요.

公司里一切都恢复正常了。

我聽日開始喺公司返工。
公司而家一切都恢復正常。

В компании всё снова как обычно.

Agora a empresa está no horário de almoço.
Na empresa, tudo voltou ao normal.
